codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds structured output support to the Ollama provider. The format parameter is properly set for both JSON mode (format: 'json') and schema mode (format: { schema }). Response validation against Zod schema works correctly, error handling includes rawOutput in StructuredOutputError cases. Vision support (base64 image extraction) properly coexists with format parameter. Error handling for schema+tools mutual exclusivity is implemented.

summary: PASS - The ollama-structured-output feature implementation is complete and correct. All 14 structured output tests pass, covering: format parameter with JSON Schema (VAL-PROVIDER-OLLAMA-001), vision with base64 extraction (VAL-PROVIDER-OLLAMA-003), and JSON mode vs schema modes (VAL-PROVIDER-OLLAMA-004). The implementation follows TDD patterns from the backend-worker skill, correctly converts Zod/JSON Schema to Ollama's format structure, validates responses, and handles edge cases like null content and empty strings. Typecheck passes. All 267 tests pass.
